mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND game_id = #{gameId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_cart(user_id, game_id, quantity, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{gameId}, #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE t_cart SET quantity = #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS cartId, c.game_id AS gameId, g.name AS gameName, g.cover_url AS coverUrl, g.price AS price, c.quantity AS quantity FROM t_cart c JOIN t_game g ON c.game_id = g.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC
